slides.name: Title Badge Chart
slides.description: A slide featuring a centered title, a category badge, and a chart with supplementary labels, supporting bar, grouped bar, stacked bar, clustered bar, diverging bar, horizontal bar, line, area, pie, donut, and scatter chart types.

title.description: The main heading of the slide

badgeText.description: The text displayed within the colored box

topDescription.description: The textual label at the top right of the chart

bottomDescription.description: The textual label at the bottom right of the chart

columns.description: Labels for the data categories and legend items

rows.description: Array of data points for the chart

label.description: The name of the category shown on the X-axis

value1.description: Value for the first series (bottom part of stack)

value2.description: Value for the second series (optional for single-series charts)

slides.name: Title Description Bullet List
slides.description: A clean two-column layout with a main title and description on the left, and up to 5 bullet points on the right. Each bullet has a heading and a short description. Ideal for key takeaways, feature highlights, or structured lists with context.

title.description: The main title of the slide

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.
description.description: The main paragraph description on the slide

default.heading: Market expansion
default.description: Prioritize high-growth verticals and geographic regions with strong demand.

default.heading: Customer retention
default.description: Reduce churn through proactive support and tailored success programs.

default.heading: Product innovation
default.description: Ship features that align with top customer requests and usage data.

default.heading: Operational efficiency
default.description: Automate repetitive workflows to free capacity for strategic work.

default.heading: Team enablement
default.description: Invest in training and tools so teams can execute at scale.

bullets.description: A list of up to 5 bullet points, each with a heading and description

heading.description: The heading for this bullet point

description.description: The description for this bullet point

slides.name: Title Description Contact Cards
slides.description: A closing slide with a title, description text, and three contact information cards for email, phone, and website, ideal for thank you or contact pages.

title.description: The main heading of the slide

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.
description.description: A brief description or concluding text

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.

slides.name: Title Description Image Right
slides.description: A two-column slide with a title and description paragraph on the left, and a large featured image on the right.

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.

slides.name: Title Description Radial Cards

slides.name: Title Description Timeline
slides.description: A two-column slide with a title and description on the left, and a vertical timeline of events with year markers on the right, ideal for milestones or history.

title.description: The main title of the slide

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.

slides.name: Title Dual Charts Comparison
slides.description: A comparison slide with a centered title and two side-by-side chart panels, each supporting bar, grouped bar, stacked bar, clustered bar, diverging bar, horizontal bar, line, area, pie, donut, and scatter chart types for data visualization.

title.description: The main heading of the slide

heading.description: The heading for this comparison section

tagline.description: An optional tagline or status text for the section

footerLabel.description: Label displayed at the bottom of the chart area

legendItems.description: Labels for the two data series in the legend

graph.description: Data for the graph in this section

label.description: The label for the individual category

value2.description: The second value (optional for single-series charts)

slides.name: Title Dual Comparison Cards
slides.description: A comparison slide with a centered title and two side-by-side cards featuring numbered headings and descriptions, ideal for problem/solution or before/after comparisons.

title.description: The main title of the slide

default.heading: Problem
default.description: Presentation are communication tools that can be used as demontrations, lectures, reports, and more. it is mostly presented before an audience.

default.heading: Solution
default.description: Presentation are communication tools that can be used as demontrations, lectures, reports, and more. it is mostly presented before an audience.

slides.name: Title KPI Grid
slides.description: A slide featuring a centered title followed by a flexible grid of up to 8 KPI metric boxes with values and descriptions, perfect for dashboards and reports.

title.description: The main title of the slide

kpiList.description: A list of up to 8 KPI items

value.description: The numeric value or percentage for the KPI

description.description: The text description or label for the KPI

slides.name: Title Metrics Chart
slides.description: A two-column slide with a title, description, and 2x2 metric grid on the left, and a chart panel on the right supporting bar, grouped bar, stacked bar, clustered bar, diverging bar, horizontal bar, line, area, pie, donut, and scatter chart types.

title.description: The main title of the slide

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.

metrics.description: Four metric boxes displayed in a grid

title.description: The text in the green highlight box above the chart

topLabel.description: Secondary label at the top right of the chart area

bottomLabel.description: Secondary label at the bottom right of the chart area

seriesNames.description: The names of the two data series for the legend

value2.description: Value for the second series (optional for single-series charts)

slides.name: Title Metrics Image
slides.description: A slide featuring a title, description, and a 2x2 grid of metric cards on the left, with a large image on the right.

title.description: The main heading of the slide

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M .
description.description: The secondary description text below the title

metrics.description: A list of up to 4 metric cards

value.description: The percentage or numeric value of the metric

label.description: The description label for the metric

default.__image_prompt__: A professional business setting showing collaboration or success.

mainImage.description: The large image featured on the right side of the slide

slides.name: Title Points Donut Grid
slides.description: A slide with a title and numbered summary points on the left, paired with a 2x3 grid of analytical cards featuring donut progress charts on the right.

title.description: The main title of the slide

default: Exceeded revenue target by 12% ($2.4M vs $2.1M target), driven by strong performance in paid search and email campaigns
Marketing influenced 68% of total pipeline value, up from 52% last quarter
Paid Search ROI improved to 5.8x (from 4.1x), making it our most efficient channel
points.description: A list of key summary points

cards.description: A list of up to 6 data cards

percentageValue.description: The percentage value to be shown in the donut chart

footerHeading.description: The descriptive label in the card footer

footerDescription.description: The specific detail in the card footer

slides.name: Title Description With Multi-Chart Grid
slides.description: A neo-standard dashboard layout with title, description, and 1–6 auto-arranged charts. Supports bar (vertical, horizontal, grouped, stacked, clustered, diverging), line, area, pie, donut, and scatter charts.

description.default: Comprehensive overview of key metrics and performance indicators across multiple data dimensions.

slides.name: Title Description With Multi-Chart Grid + Metrics
slides.description: A neo-standard dashboard with title, description, up to 4 KPI metrics, and 1–6 auto-arranged charts. Supports bar (vertical, horizontal, grouped, stacked, clustered, diverging), line, area, pie, donut, and scatter charts.

description.default: Comprehensive overview of key metrics and performance indicators across multiple data dimensions.

slides.name: Title Description With Multi-Chart Grid + Bullets
slides.description: A neo-standard dashboard with title, description, up to 6 bullet points, and 1–4 auto-arranged charts. Supports bar (vertical, horizontal, grouped, stacked, clustered, diverging), line, area, pie, donut, and scatter charts.

description.default: Comprehensive overview of key metrics and performance indicators across multiple data dimensions.
